articles.title: California Earthquake Shakes San Ramon
articles.description: The USGS said the earthquake struck the San Ramon area late on Sunday night.

articles.title: US: 3.5-magnitude earthquake strikes off Southern California coast near Rancho Palos Verdes
articles.description: US News: A 3.5-magnitude earthquake struck late-night near Rancho Palos Verdes, California, felt along the coast and into Orange County. Thankfully, no injuries or damages were reported. Learn more about this seismic activity and its effects.

articles.title: 6.3 Alaska Earthquake Strikes Near Aleutians; 3.5 Magnitude Tremor Felt in Torrance and Redondo Beach
articles.description: A 6.3 Alaska earthquake struck near the Aleutian Islands while a separate 3.5 magnitude tremor was felt across Torrance and Redondo Beach in Southern California., US News, Times Now
